=== Long Changelog Plugin ===
Tags: utility
Requires at least: 6.0
Tested up to: 6.5
Stable tag: 3.0.0
License: MIT

Plugin with an extremely long changelog to test the 5000-word section limit.

== Description ==

A plugin used to verify section word-limit enforcement.

== Changelog ==

= 3.0.0 =
* Fixed issue number 1 where the widget broke unexpectedly on certain themes.
* Fixed issue number 2 where the widget broke unexpectedly on certain themes.
* Fixed issue number 3 where the widget broke unexpectedly on certain themes.
* Fixed issue number 4 where the widget broke unexpectedly on certain themes.
* Fixed issue number 5 where the widget broke unexpectedly on certain themes.
* Fixed issue number 6 where the widget broke unexpectedly on certain themes.
